programmes.show_description: With time running out, AC-12 attempt to unmask the fourth individual commanding the network of corrupt officers - but sinister forces are plotting a cover-up.

programmes.show_name: Hell For Leather - The Story of Gaelic Football
programmes.show_description: Waking sleeping giants, playing through the Troubles, Donegal's All-Ireland journey and the birth of modern football. (SL)

Master builder Harrison Gardner helps people take on the challenge of constructing or renovating their own homes, beginning with Dublin couple Grace and Robbie.
